# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "tenantId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[subscription().tenantId]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure AD tenant ID"
      }
    },
    "appServicePrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the primary application service principal"
      }
    },
    "devTeamGroupObjectId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the development team AAD group"
      }
    },
    "ciCdServicePrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the CI/CD pipeline service principal"
      }
    },
    "backendServicePrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the backend service principal"
      }
    },
    "monitoringServicePrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the monitoring service principal"
      }
    },
    "enableSoftDelete": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "softDeleteRetentionInDays": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 90
    },
    "enablePurgeProtection": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "standard",
      "allowedValues": [
        "standard",
        "premium"
      ]
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "secretsReadListPermissions": [
      "get",
      "list"
    ],
    "secretsManagePermissions": [
      "get",
      "list",
      "set",
      "delete",
      "recover",
      "backup",
      "restore"
    ],
    "keysReadPermissions": [
      "get",
      "list"
    ],
    "certificatesReadPermissions": [
      "get",
      "list"
    ]
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
        "sku": {
          "family": "A",
          "name": "[parameters('skuName')]"
        },
        "enableSoftDelete": "[parameters('enableSoftDelete')]",
        "softDeleteRetentionInDays": "[parameters('softDeleteRetentionInDays')]",
        "enablePurgeProtection": "[parameters('enablePurgeProtection')]",
        "enableRbacAuthorization": false,
        "enabledForDeployment": false,
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": false,
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": false,
        "networkAcls": {
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "defaultAction": "Deny",
          "ipRules": [],
          "virtualNetworkRules": []
        },
        "accessPolicies": [
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('appServicePrincipalId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": "[variables('secretsReadListPermissions')]",
              "keys": [],
              "certificates": []
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('backendServicePrincipalId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": "[variables('secretsReadListPermissions')]",
              "keys": "[variables('keysReadPermissions')]",
              "certificates": "[variables('certificatesReadPermissions')]"
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('ciCdServicePrincipalId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": "[variables('secretsManagePermissions')]",
              "keys": [],
              "certificates": []
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('devTeamGroupObjectId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": "[variables('secretsReadListPermissions')]",
              "keys": "[variables('keysReadPermissions')]",
              "certificates": "[variables('certificatesReadPermissions')]"
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('monitoringServicePrincipalId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": "[variables('secretsReadListPermissions')]",
              "keys": [],
              "certificates": []
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      "tags": {
        "environment": "development",
        "purpose": "application-secrets",
        "securityReview": "required-before-production",
        "accessPolicyStatus": "broad-dev-access-needs-tightening"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/providers/diagnosticSettings",
      "apiVersion": "2021-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('keyVaultName'), '/Microsoft.Insights/auditLogs')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "logs": [
          {
            "category": "AuditEvent",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          }
        ],
        "metrics": [
          {
            "category": "AllMetrics",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "keyVaultId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    },
    "keyVaultUri": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))).vaultUri]"
    },
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
    },
    "productionReadinessChecklist": {
      "type": "object",
      "value": {
        "message": "IMPORTANT: Before promoting to production, complete the following security hardening steps.",
        "step1_review_access_policies": "Audit each access policy and remove any principals that do not require access in production. Apply the principle of least privilege - grant only the minimum permissions each identity needs.",
        "step2_remove_dev_team_direct_access": "Remove the devTeamGroupObjectId access policy entirely. Developers should not have direct Key Vault access in production. Use Privileged Identity Management (PIM) for emergency access instead.",
        "step3_restrict_cicd_permissions": "Reduce ciCdServicePrincipalId permissions to only 'get' and 'list' for secrets. Secret creation and management in production should go through a controlled change process.",
        "step4_restrict_network_access": "Configure networkAcls with specific IP ranges and virtual network rules. The current template sets defaultAction to Deny which is correct, but you must add your specific allowed networks.",
        "step5_enable_rbac_authorization": "Consider switching enableRbacAuthorization to true for finer-grained, role-based control using Azure RBAC instead of vault access policies.",
        "step6_verify_diagnostic_logging": "Ensure diagnostic settings are connected to a Log Analytics workspace or storage account for audit trail retention.",
        "step7_rotate_secrets_regularly": "Implement secret rotation policies and set expiration dates on all secrets.",
        "step8_separate_vaults_per_environment": "Use dedicated Key Vaults for each environment (dev, staging, production) rather than sharing."
      }
    }
  }
}
